subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 711982704/230725540 is not a GRB
submitter: Elisabetta Bissaldi at Politecnico and INFN Bari <elisabetta.bissaldi@ba.infn.it>
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico and INFN Bari)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 711982704/230725540
at 12:58:19.32 UT on 25 July 2023, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. 
This trigger is likely due to Local Particles."
